data.title: Solana Co-founder: Bitcoin is an insurance, not an investment
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Solana co-founder Toly said in response to community members, "Bitcoin has no value. To put it in a better way, it's insurance. Based on my life experience, a superpower has a 1% chance of collapse every year. For me, it's worth spending 1% of my wealth to buy some assets that may not go to zero in that environment. This is not an investment, but a cost, and there is no guarantee that it will work. Bitcoin can do this at both $100,000 and $10,000. If it works, it has little to do with technology other than the original innovation 15 years ago."

data.title:
$BTC's Coinbase Premium as gone into the negative recently. This shows there's been a lot of spot selling the past few days, which has been clear looking at the large ETF outflows and bearish price action.

For BTC to bounce back strong, you'd want the Coinbase Premium to return…
Solana Co-Founder Discusses Bitcoin's Value
data.description: According to PANews, Solana co-founder Toly recently expressed his views on Bitcoin's value in response to community members. He stated that Bitcoin holds no intrinsic value and is best considered as insurance. Toly explained that, based on his life experiences, there is a 1% annual chance of a superpower collapsing. In such a scenario, he believes it is worthwhile to allocate 1% of one's wealth to assets that might retain value. He emphasized that this approach is not an investment but rather a cost, with no guarantee of success. Toly noted that Bitcoin could serve this purpose whether its price is $100,000 or $10,000, and that its effectiveness is largely unrelated to technology, aside from its initial innovation 15 years ago.

data.title: A whale deposited 3.38 million USDC to Hyperliquid to purchase HYPE
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale address deposited $3.38 million in USDC to Hyperliquid in the past hour to purchase HYPE, and has purchased 116,147 HYPE (worth approximately $2.36 million) so far.

data.title: SEC says ‘Meme Coins Not Securities,’ Pump.Fun Revenue Falls
data.description:
The US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has issued a staff statement explicitly declaring that meme coins generally do not qualify as securities under federal law. Released on February 27, 2025, the statement provides clarity for the cryptocurrency sector after years of regulatory uncertainty surrounding token classifications. data.title: 5 whale addresses have transferred 3.54 million SOL to Coinbase in the past 12 hours
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, 5 whale addresses unstaked 5.52 million SOL (about 810 million US dollars) in the past 12 hours, of which 3.54 million (516 million US dollars) were transferred to Coinbase Prime.

data.title: Bitcoin returns to the top ten global asset market capitalization rankings
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to 8marketcap monitoring data, Bitcoin has returned to the top ten in the global asset market value ranking. The data shows that the current market value of Bitcoin is approximately 1.694 trillion US dollars, surpassing Meta Platforms (Facebook) to rank 10th in the global asset market value, with a 24-hour increase of 6.80%.

data.title: Circle's USDC Circulation Sees Significant Decline
data.description: According to PANews, official data reveals that Circle issued approximately 3.7 billion USDC and redeemed around 4.3 billion USDC in the week ending February 27. This resulted in a net decrease of about 600 million USDC in circulation. The total circulation of USDC stands at 55.5 billion, with reserves amounting to approximately 55.7 billion USD. Of these reserves, about 5.9 billion USD is held in cash, while the Circle Reserve Fund holds approximately 49.8 billion USD.

data.title: What is Bitcoin price going to do next? — Bear trap, bottom, or oversold bounce?
data.description:
Crypto traders expect Bitcoin price to remain choppy in the short term as a new range must be established after this week’s double-digit drawdown.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/what-is-bitcoin-price-going-to-do-next-bear-trap-bottom-or-oversold-bounce?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
